tasks.label: Clean and Reconfigure CMake
tasks.command: "C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\BuildTools\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvars64.bat" && if exist build (rmdir /s /q build) && cmake -G Ninja -S . -B build -DCMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER="C:/Program Files/NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit/CUDA/v13.1/bin/nvcc.exe"
